<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/planningUnit/programs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of planning units for a list of supply plan programs

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}}},"description":"The list of program IDs to retrieve planning units for","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"idString":{"type":"string"},"label":{"type":"object","properties":{"active":{"type":"boolean"},"baseModel":{"type":"object","properties":{"active":{"type":"boolean"},"baseModel":"circular(BaseModel)","createdBy":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"BasicUser"},"createdDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"lastModifiedBy":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"BasicUser"},"lastModifiedDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"title":"BaseModel"},"createdBy":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"BasicUser"},"createdDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"labelId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"label_en":{"type":"string"},"label_fr":{"type":"string"},"label_pr":{"type":"string"},"label_sp":{"type":"string"},"lastModifiedBy":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"BasicUser"},"lastModifiedDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"title":"Label"},"name":{"type":"string"}},"title":"SimpleObject"}}}},"description":"Returns a list of planning units for a list of programs"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"User does not have rights to access these programs"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while getting planning unit list"}}}
>
